fixture: 014_filter_equals

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qty INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO items VALUES (1, 5)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO items VALUES (2, 15)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM items WHERE id = 2
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 2

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT qty FROM items WHERE qty <> 5
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 15
